sections.paragraph:
Original: פּצח

Transliteration: pâtsach

Phonetic: paw-tsakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cause to break or burst forth, break forth with, break out
    1. (Qal) to break out, break forth with
    2. (Piel) to break up

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1796

Part(s) of speech: Verb
